# Castellon

> Geotechnical engineering company in Chile, providing professional services in soil mechanics, foundation engineering and site investigation.

## Services
- [Aislacion Sismica](https://castellon.mecanicadesuelos.vip/aislacion-sismica/)
- [Amplificacion Sismica](https://castellon.mecanicadesuelos.vip/amplificacion-sismica/)
- [Anclajes](https://castellon.mecanicadesuelos.vip/anclajes/)
- [Capacidad De Carga](https://castellon.mecanicadesuelos.vip/capacidad-de-carga/)
- [Cbr Vial](https://castellon.mecanicadesuelos.vip/cbr-vial/)
- [Cimentaciones](https://castellon.mecanicadesuelos.vip/cimentaciones/)
- [Cimentaciones Superficiales](https://castellon.mecanicadesuelos.vip/cimentaciones-superficiales/)
- [Compactacion Dinamica](https://castellon.mecanicadesuelos.vip/compactacion-dinamica/)
- [Corte Directo](https://castellon.mecanicadesuelos.vip/corte-directo/)
- [Dilatometro](https://castellon.mecanicadesuelos.vip/dilatometro/)

## Contact
- Website: https://castellon.mecanicadesuelos.vip/

## About
This page provides information about geotechnical engineering services available in Chile.
The company complies with local and international standards including ASTM, ISO and country-specific norms.
